title: Denby - Elements Fern Green Cereal Bowls Set of 4 - Dishwasher Microwave Safe Crockery 820ml 17cm - Green, White Ceramic Stoneware Tableware - Chip & Crack Resistant Soup Bowls
features: SET OF 4 CEREAL BOWLS: This set contains 4 green and white cereal bowls with a white inside (17cm diameter, 820ml capacity) - These cereal bowls are a kitchen essential and can be used in the microwave, oven and dishwasher making cooking and clearing up quick and easy - They are also great for individual pies and puddings, served straight from the oven to the table.

HAND-CRAFTED IN ENGLAND: Hand-Crafted in the Denby Pottery in England from locally-sourced, high quality clay - Each item is touched by at least 20 pairs of hands during the making process in our 200 year old factory in Derbyshire

DURABLE & VERSATILE STONEWARE: This set has been expertly glazed to prevent chipping and enhance durability - Elements pieces can be used time and time again, from a casual evening takeaway to the dinner party of the year, to the first barbecue of the summer, making it the perfect choice for your home

OVEN, MICROWAVE, DISHWASHER & FREEZER SAFE: Each item in this set can be safely used in the oven, dishwasher, freezer and microwave meaning you can cook your food in the same pot you serve it in, then save the leftovers and reheat it the next day, saving you time and money

TIMELESS DESIGN: Elements crockery has a simple and beautiful design allowing the trends of the modern world to continue at full speed while Elements stays constant and sophisticated - This dinnerware set features a number of versatile pieces designed for modern living: perfectly sized bowls for soup, cereal and pasta, as well as rice and serving bowls, and beautiful and functional medium and dinner plates

BUY WELL, BUY ONCE: Denby crafted products are made to last - Our products are sustainably made - we are proudly the first UK tableware manufacturer to be able to claim ‘zero to landfill’ for all our process waste - Such is the quality and durability of Denby that we are proud to offer a 10 year guarantee on our Made in England Denby stoneware ranges, giving you all the confidence you need to really love and enjoy your range
description: From the manufacturer Elements Collection Denby Elements is a contemporary collection with modern shapes and colours. Featuring a wide palette selection, Denby Elements is perfect for starting a new collection or for adding pops of colour into your current tableware. Handcrafted and hand-decorated at our pottery in Derbyshire, every ceramic piece is made to last. With a wide range of versatile items to choose from, including plates, bowls and mugs in various glazes and sizes, you can build a unique Elements dinner set. Each colourway is designed to work as a standalone collection but are also great to mix and match. Denby Elements stoneware is practical and durable enough for everyday use while stunning enough for best. It's covered by our 10-year promise and is suitable for use in the microwave, oven, freezer and dishwasher. These are just some of the factors making it a conscious choice for your home. Expertly glazed for enhanced durability Each piece crafted by Denby is tough enough for everyday and stunning enough for best. Our stoneware products are expertly glazed making them dishwasher safe and suitable for microwave and freezer use for cooking, reheating and storing food. Practical and durable style which is made to last Denby is known for its durability, something which is becoming more important than ever as we look to reduce disposable purchases. All of our stoneware ranges come with a 10 year promise and are hand-crafted in Derbyshire using locally sourced clay. As our stoneware is extremely strong you can use it confidently for all occasions. Practical and durable for everyday use The Denby Elements dinnerware collection is perfect for any occasion; everyday family dinners, barbecues or celebrations. With a wide range of different sized plates, bowls and drinkware we have the perfect serving piece for any dish. Inspired design The Elements collection features modern colours that fit effortlessly into any home. The glazes range from blue, green, grey, pink, black to white and are durable enough to be used every day. Some of our colourways also have Coupe shapes with an all over glaze that really highlight the beautiful glazes of this collection. Sustainably made, designed to last Sustainably made, designed to last At Denby caring for the environment and our planet is very important to us. We are proudly the first UK tableware manufacturer to be able to claim ‘zero to landfill’ for all our process waste. Due to this our stunning and versatile collections remain the tableware of choice for the conscious shopper, as they have been for over 200 years. 20 pairs of hands with traditional techniques Each piece of our stoneware dinnerware is handcrafted in Derbyshire by our super-talented and passionate craftspeople using well-preserved traditional pottery techniques which have been passed down over generations. Each item passes through at least 20 pairs of hands before arriving at your home to be used and enjoyed.
